title: Azur & Asmar: The Princes' Quest
posterAlt: Azur & Asmar: The Princes' Quest (2006) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Raised on tales of a Djinn fairy princess, Azur, a young Frenchman goes to North Africa in search of the sprite, only to discover that his close childhood friend, Asmar, an Arab youth whose mother raised both boys also seeks the genie.
synopsis: Azur & Asmar: The Princes' Quest (2006) is a animation and family film from France and Spain. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a L certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
